title: [BUG] ExcelJS 4.1.0 is not working with Angular 9 in IE11
author: ashishsharma229

comments.author: ThomasKruegl
MorisNotari
ThomasKruegl
comments.body:
Update:
My Upload Excel problem was not related to exceljs, it was about IE not supporting Blob.arrayBuffer();

The problem with extrem long times when creating an excel is related to .protect. The default 100.000 iterations for SHA512 hashing are too much for IE obviously... 

side note: There is a related TODO in the exceljs code, maybe solving this also helps:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/72f8f90589afa6613f34ce0a0ffb00e5104e28d3/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L670

But at least this means i was able to reduce the time by setting the 'spinCount' option for .protect to 1000. The reduced security is not an issue for our situation.

comments.author: domehead100
shashi92
